name: java-message-key-navigator
description: A VS Code extension to assist with Java I18N (internationalization) message management

java-message-key-navigator.messageKeyExt.description: Specifies the method invocation patterns (regular expressions) to target for extracting I18N message keys. For example: infrastructureLogger\.log. Completion will only be enabled within method calls matching the configured patterns.

java-message-key-navigator.propertyFileG.description: Paths to additional .properties files to include in validation (supports glob patterns)

java-message-key-navigator.annotationKey.description: Regex patterns to extract I18N keys from annotations.

java-message-key-navigator.argBuilderPat.description: Defines methods that build argument arrays with a known argument count. When a method call matching a pattern is used as the argument expression, the configured argCount is used for placeholder validation.

pattern.description: Method name to match (e.g. "buildArgs"). Matches bare calls and qualified calls like Utils.buildArgs(...).

argCount.description: The number of arguments the method produces.

commands.title: Java Message Key Navigator: Validate All Files

scripts.benchmark:strict: npm run compile && BENCH_STRICT=1 node benchmark/run-benchmarks.js
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 npm run bundle && cross-env NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vsce package
